items.summary: Remove or suppress the draft editor origin error (disallowed origin: https://molecular-lavender-hsv-draft.caffeine.xyz) that appears in the console during paste operations
Fix the backend paste retrieval logic so that newly created pastes with valid IDs (e.g., 1771800332721583303) return the correct paste data instead of null
Verify that the paste ID format used during creation matches the format expected during retrieval, ensuring consistency between storage and lookup operations
